title: Source-family saturation map
current_support_summary: 15 declared source families are already structured in a dashboard-safe table, with 13 seeded, 0 queue_only, and 2 planned rows; thin-family blockers remain concentrated in sf08, sf09, sf11, sf13, and appendix-only/manual-overlay sf06.
paper_use: Methods/data figure on observability boundary and bounded completeness model.
figure_or_table_claim_ceiling: Can support claims about declared source-family coverage and readiness states, not real-world prevalence or corpus completeness.
visualization_hook: Dashboard source-family saturation map with readiness and authority filters.
main_blocker: The main blocker is not family enumeration but thin-family evidence depth in court, public-sector traceability, independent security support, and appendix-only/manual-overlay handling.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Keep Figure 1 tied to CCR-008 and the canonical registry so the 13/0/2 denominator and thin-family blocker legend stay visible in manuscript captions.

title: Taxonomy support heatmap
current_support_summary: The staged dashboard-safe heatmap still shows 15 category rows split 10 authoritatively_seeded, 2 candidate_only_seeded, and 3 zero_seed_local_gap, but the live duplicate/taxonomy control stack now holds 11 authority-backed, 1 candidate-only, and 3 zero-seed on a 40 review rows / 38 governed records / 28 stable-or-standalone lineage core while the staged mechanical figure contract still sits at 35 visible rows / 27 lineages.
paper_use: Core novelty/gap figure for the first LIMEN paper.
figure_or_table_claim_ceiling: Can support claims about uneven local category support and explicit gap disclosure, not absence of edge cases in zero-seed categories; headline counts should follow the live 11/1/3 control state until the staged heatmap is regenerated.
visualization_hook: Taxonomy heatmap with support-state and review-priority overlays.
main_blocker: The shared export still trails the live duplicate-controlled package, so captions can drift if Figure 2 cites the staged 10/2/3 split as if it were current.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Carry the shared zero-seed and overlay-frontier caption controls into every Figure 2 or Table 2 reuse, and regenerate the staged heatmap from the live 40 / 38 / 28 seeded core before promoting new count-bearing prose.

title: Legal uncertainty matrix
current_support_summary: 15 category rows carry review-owner, stronger-source-needed, and conclusion-limit fields; 10 are High-priority and 5 are Medium-priority review surfaces.
paper_use: Hostile-reviewer defense figure showing where LIMEN declines overclaiming.
figure_or_table_claim_ceiling: Can support claims that LIMEN encodes legal/normative uncertainty explicitly; cannot support automated legal qualification.
visualization_hook: Dashboard uncertainty matrix with stronger-source-needed drilldown.
main_blocker: Most rows still lack direct primary-text legal anchors.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Use this as a limitation-forward figure and route deep legal claims to queue entries instead of prose inflation.

title: Duplicate-control graph
current_support_summary: 25 graph edges are already exportable: 14 identifier_collision_blocker edges and 11 reviewed_not_duplicate subtype-separation edges; the graph now materializes every graph-eligible reviewed package in the live duplicate-control ledger.
paper_use: Methods-quality figure on join safety and duplicate review as substantive infrastructure.
figure_or_table_claim_ceiling: Can support claims about join risk and review discipline, not recurrence or repeated-event prevalence.
visualization_hook: Dashboard duplicate-review graph with blocker/non-merge visual separation.
main_blocker: Graph-versus-ledger scope must remain explicit even though no graph-eligible reviewed package is currently missing; stable duplicate clusters and singleton review rows still live outside the edge export.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Keep blocker semantics explicit, preserve the graph-versus-ledger split, and keep the non-recurrence ceiling attached whenever reviewed-not-duplicate overlays are reused.

title: Publication-safe evidence-tier funnel
current_support_summary: The refreshed safe funnel covers 21 publication-safe lineages: 14 T3_authoritative_source, 1 T3_authoritative_source_direct_url_resolved, and 6 T1_single_public_source rows, with confidence caps high=15, medium=0, low=6.
paper_use: Bounded results/methods figure on evidence maturity under normalized lineage-safe joins.
figure_or_table_claim_ceiling: Can support publication-safe maturity claims only; not safe for completeness, prevalence, or flat-equivalence rhetoric.
visualization_hook: Dashboard funnel with denominator badge and confidence overlay.
main_blocker: Counts remain bounded by duplicate-review state and one singleton-ahead-of-review caveat.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Use the refreshed safe funnel rather than the older staged 17-record file for headline manuscript or dashboard work.

title: Jurisdiction/language coverage map
current_support_summary: The staged jurisdiction-language surface contains 12 rows, including Denmark and France as bounded non-English authoritative sidecars outside the six-row multilingual ladder, while the current safe aggregate has 6 translation-dependent lineages; the multilingual routing layer splits 6 queue rows into 1 bounded_substantive_row, 2 bounded_appendix_row, and 3 limitations_queue_only rows.
paper_use: Visibility-bias figure for methods, limitations, and multilingual observability discussion.
figure_or_table_claim_ceiling: Can support claims about where current public evidence is visible and translation-dependent, including bounded non-English authoritative sidecars; not safe for stable country ranking, prevalence inference, or multilingual frontier closure.
visualization_hook: Dashboard jurisdiction/language map with translation-review, evidence-tier, and sidecar-boundary filters.
main_blocker: Coverage is sparse, uneven, still partly staged, and must keep the sidecar-versus-ladder split explicit.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Use only as an observability map paired with the multilingual routing split, six-of-six translation-review-required metadata, and the Denmark/France sidecar boundary contract.

title: Authority-balance composition panel
current_support_summary: The current safe aggregate contains 21 lineages split authority_anchor=7, technical_authority=7, translation_caution_authority=1, provisional_or_limitations_only=6.
paper_use: Reviewer-facing denominator-control figure on evidence composition.
figure_or_table_claim_ceiling: Can support bounded claims about compositional heterogeneity and caption discipline, not severity ranking or social importance ranking.
visualization_hook: Dashboard composition panel with explicit translation-caution badge and provisional-row overlay.
main_blocker: Authority classes are easy to overread if the caption drops denominator and claim-ceiling language.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Keep Figure 7 tied to CCR-014 whenever any caption, legend, or manuscript derivative is refreshed.

current_support_summary: 10 authoritative rows are already table-ready, with 7 document_grade rows, 1 follow_through_grade row, 1 partial_document_grade row, and 1 summary_grade row showing that T3 is not a flat support class.
paper_use: Reviewer-facing table on support-depth heterogeneity within authoritative rows.
figure_or_table_claim_ceiling: Can support narrow claims about procedural/document depth and claim ceilings, not merits, legality, or severity ranking.
visualization_hook: Dashboard facet or appendix table contrasting direct-document, normalization-limited, and summary-only support.
main_blocker: The blocker pair remains one open court-facing complaint/decree/order gap and one cleaner exact-caption public source.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Keep Table 1A tied to CCR-009 and preserve the 7/1/1/1 split in any manuscript or dashboard reuse.
